test_cases.test_case: Successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid email and password.
steps: 2. Enter valid email in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter valid password in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Signed in successfully.' and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with incorrect password
preconditions: User has a registered account with valid email and incorrect password.
steps: 2. Enter valid email in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter incorrect password in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again,' and the password field is cleared.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with unregistered email
preconditions: User does not have an account.
steps: 2. Enter unregistered email in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter any password in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again,' and the password field is cleared.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with empty fields
test_cases.expected_result: User sees error messages indicating that both fields are required.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with maximum length email and password
preconditions: User has a registered account with maximum length email and password.
steps: 2. Enter maximum length valid email in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter maximum length valid password in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees 'Signed in successfully.' and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with email in invalid format
steps: 2. Enter an invalid email format in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter any password in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees error message indicating that the email format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with password missing required characters
steps: 2. Enter valid email in the Email/Username field.
3. Enter a password that is less than 8 characters or missing required character types.
test_cases.expected_result: User sees error message indicating that the password does not meet the requirements.

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration with valid inputs
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully — please sign in, then redirect to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with invalid email format
steps: 2. Enter an invalid email format in the Username field.
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid email format is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with mismatched passwords
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
3. Enter a different value in the Confirm Password field than in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating passwords do not match is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with maximum length username
steps: 2. Enter a valid email with maximum length (e.g., 254 characters) in the Username field.
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully — please sign in, then redirect to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with empty fields
test_cases.expected_result: Error messages indicating all fields are required are displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with invalid phone number format
steps: 2. Enter an invalid phone number format in the Phone Number field.
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid phone number format is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with maximum length password
steps: 2. Enter a password with maximum length (e.g., 128 characters) in the Password field.
3. Enter the same value in the Confirm Password field.
4. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Account created successfully — please sign in, then redirect to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with invalid ZIP Code format
steps: 2. Enter an invalid ZIP Code format in the ZIP Code field.
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid ZIP Code format is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Registration with invalid SSN format
steps: 2. Enter an invalid SSN format in the Social Security Number field.
3. Fill in all other required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating invalid SSN format is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Display welcome message with user's name
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard displays a welcome message with the user's name.

test_cases.test_case: Display customer accounts table
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: A table of all customer accounts is displayed with correct details.

test_cases.test_case: Display accounts table when user has no accounts
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: A message indicating that no accounts are available is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Display accounts with maximum number of accounts
preconditions: User has maximum allowed customer accounts
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: All customer accounts are displayed correctly in the table, ordered by open date.

test_cases.test_case: Display accounts with edge case account numbers
preconditions: User has accounts with edge case account numbers
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: Account numbers are masked correctly, showing only the last 4 digits.

test_cases.test_case: Display total balance in footer
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: The footer row displays the correct total balance across all accounts.

test_cases.test_case: Display accounts with varying account statuses
preconditions: User has accounts with different statuses
steps: 1. Navigate to the Accounts Overview module.
test_cases.expected_result: All accounts are displayed with their respective statuses, including active badges.

test_cases.test_case: Open Checking Account with Valid Deposit
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '50' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully! User is redirected to accounts overview.

test_cases.test_case: Open Savings Account with Valid Deposit
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '150' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully! User is redirected to accounts overview.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account without Selecting Account Type
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
steps: 2. Enter '50' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that account type must be selected.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account with Insufficient Deposit for Checking
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '10' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the deposit amount must be at least $25.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account with Insufficient Deposit for Savings
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '50' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the deposit amount must be at least $100.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account with Maximum Deposit Amount
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '999999' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully! User is redirected to accounts overview.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account with Zero Deposit Amount
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter '0' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the deposit amount must be greater than $0.

test_cases.test_case: Open Account with Non-Numeric Deposit Amount
preconditions: User is on the Open New Account page
User has a valid funding source with sufficient balance
steps: 2. Enter 'abc' in the Initial Deposit Amount field
3. Select a funding source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the deposit amount must be numeric.

test_cases.test_case: Successful internal transfer
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully. Transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Successful external transfer
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
5. Enter a valid external account number
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully. Transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with insufficient funds
preconditions: User has insufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
4. Enter a transfer amount greater than the available balance
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Insufficient funds' is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with mismatched external account numbers
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
5. Enter a valid external account number
6. Enter a different external account number in confirmation
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Account numbers do not match' is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with zero amount
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
4. Enter '0' in the transfer amount field
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the transfer amount must be greater than zero is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with maximum length account number
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
5. Enter a maximum length valid external account number
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully. Transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Transfer with empty transfer amount
preconditions: User has sufficient funds in the selected account
steps: 1. Navigate to the Transfer Funds page
2. Select 'My ParaBank Account' as transfer type
3. Select a source account from the dropdown
4. Leave the transfer amount field empty
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the transfer amount is required is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Successful payment submission
steps: 2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Account numbers do not match
steps: 2. Fill in all fields with valid data except for Payee Account Number and Confirm Account Number (make them different).
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Account numbers do not match' is displayed inline.

test_cases.test_case: Insufficient funds
steps: 2. Fill in all fields with valid data.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Insufficient funds' is displayed inline.

test_cases.test_case: Empty fields submission
test_cases.expected_result: Error messages for all required fields are displayed inline.

test_cases.test_case: Maximum length input
steps: 2. Fill in all fields with maximum allowed character lengths.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Boundary value for payment amount
steps: 2. Fill in all fields with valid data and set Payment Amount to the exact available balance.
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Successful Personal Loan Request
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
steps: 3. Select collateral account with sufficient funds
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully! Account details are displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Loan Amount Below Minimum for Auto Loan
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating loan amount is below the minimum required for Auto loan.

test_cases.test_case: Down Payment Greater Than Loan Amount
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating down payment must be less than loan amount.

test_cases.test_case: Maximum Loan Amount for Home Loan
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
steps: 3. Select collateral account with sufficient funds
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully! Account details are displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Minimum Down Payment for Personal Loan
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
steps: 3. Select collateral account with sufficient funds
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully! Account details are displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Insufficient Collateral Value
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
steps: 3. Select collateral account with insufficient funds
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating inadequate collateral value.

test_cases.test_case: Empty Loan Amount Field
preconditions: User is on the loan request page
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating loan amount is required.

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with valid data
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 3. Edit the Street Address to '123 Main St'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updated successfully. The data is refreshed with the new values.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with missing First Name
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 1. Leave the First Name field empty
3. Fill in Street Address with '123 Main St'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error banner displays 'First Name is required.' and highlights the First Name field.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile with invalid ZIP Code
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 3. Edit the Street Address to '123 Main St'
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error banner displays 'Invalid ZIP Code format.' and highlights the ZIP Code field.

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with maximum length fields
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
steps: 3. Edit the Street Address to '123 Main Street, Apartment 456, Very Long Address'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updated successfully. The data is refreshed with the new values.

test_cases.test_case: Update profile with empty fields
preconditions: User is on the customer profile page
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error banner displays 'All fields are required.' and highlights all fields.

test_cases.test_case: Submit valid card request
preconditions: User has a valid account with good standing
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
3. Choose a valid account to link.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID.

test_cases.test_case: Submit card request with incomplete address
preconditions: User has a valid account with good standing
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
3. Choose a valid account to link.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows an error message indicating the address is incomplete.

test_cases.test_case: Submit card request with invalid account status
preconditions: User has a valid account with bad standing
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
3. Choose an account with bad standing.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows an error message indicating the account is not in good standing.

test_cases.test_case: Submit card request with maximum length address
preconditions: User has a valid account with good standing
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
3. Choose a valid account to link.
4. Enter a shipping address at the maximum allowed length.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows 'Card request submitted successfully.' with a tracking ID.

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with valid inputs
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown.
3. Enter a new spending limit within policy.
4. Optionally enter travel notice dates and destinations.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows 'Card controls updated successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with spending limit above policy
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown.
3. Enter a new spending limit above the allowed policy.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows an inline error message indicating the limit exceeds policy.

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with maximum spending limit
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown.
3. Enter the maximum allowed spending limit.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows 'Card controls updated successfully.'

test_cases.test_case: Update card controls with invalid travel notice dates
steps: 1. Navigate to the Manage Cards page.
2. Select an existing card from the dropdown.
4. Enter travel notice dates that are in the past.
test_cases.expected_result: System shows an inline error message indicating the travel notice dates are invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Successful Buy Trade Execution
steps: 4. Enter a quantity greater than zero
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully. Order ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Successful Recurring Investment Plan Creation
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 3. Enter a contribution amount that meets the minimum
5. Enter a start date in the future
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Trade Execution with Insufficient Buying Power
steps: 4. Enter a quantity greater than zero
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating insufficient buying power is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Trade Execution with Non-Existent Fund Symbol
steps: 4. Enter a quantity greater than zero
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the fund symbol does not exist is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Recurring Investment Plan Creation with Past Start Date
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 3. Enter a contribution amount that meets the minimum
5. Enter a start date in the past
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating that the start date must be in the future is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Trade Execution with Maximum Quantity
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully. Order ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Recurring Investment Plan Creation with Minimum Contribution Amount
preconditions: User has sufficient balance in the funding account
steps: 5. Enter a start date in the future
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Trade Execution with Zero Quantity
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating quantity must be greater than zero is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Generate statement with valid date range
preconditions: User has at least one account
steps: 2. Select a valid month-and-year or custom date range.
3. Choose an account from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Generate statement with invalid date range
preconditions: User has at least one account
steps: 2. Select an invalid date range (e.g., end date before start date).
3. Choose an account from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.test_case: Generate statement with maximum date range
preconditions: User has at least one account
steps: 2. Select the maximum allowed date range (e.g., 1 year).
3. Choose an account from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Save e-statement preference with valid email
steps: 2. Check the checkbox for paperless statements.
3. Enter a valid email address in the Email Address field.
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated.

test_cases.test_case: Save e-statement preference with invalid email
steps: 2. Check the checkbox for paperless statements.
3. Enter an invalid email address in the Email Address field (e.g., 'invalid-email').
test_cases.expected_result: Email field highlighted with guidance.

test_cases.test_case: Save e-statement preference with maximum length email
steps: 2. Check the checkbox for paperless statements.
3. Enter an email address at the maximum allowed length (e.g., 254 characters).
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated.

test_cases.test_case: Generate statement with empty fields
preconditions: User has at least one account
steps: 2. Leave the Statement Period field empty.
3. Choose an account from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.test_case: Change password successfully with valid inputs
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
3. Enter the current password in the Current Password field.
4. Enter a valid new password in the New Password field.
5. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with incorrect current password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
3. Enter an incorrect current password in the Current Password field.
4. Enter a valid new password in the New Password field.
5. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating the current password is incorrect.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with non-matching new passwords
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
3. Enter the current password in the Current Password field.
4. Enter a valid new password in the New Password field.
5. Enter a different password in the Confirm New Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message indicating the new passwords do not match.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to change password with empty fields
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
test_cases.expected_result: Error messages indicating that all fields are required.

test_cases.test_case: Change password with maximum length password
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
3. Enter the current password in the Current Password field.
4. Enter a new password of maximum allowed length in the New Password field.
5. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Change password with a strong password containing special characters
steps: 1. Navigate to the Security Settings page.
3. Enter the current password in the Current Password field.
4. Enter a strong password with special characters in the New Password field.
5. Confirm the new password in the Confirm New Password field.
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Send a secure message successfully
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field.
2. Select a category from the dropdown.
3. Enter a message in the Message Body.
test_cases.expected_result: Message sent successfully. Ticket ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to send a secure message without a message body
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field.
2. Select a category from the dropdown.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance shows an error message indicating that the message body is required.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to send a secure message with an invalid attachment type
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Enter a valid subject in the Subject field.
2. Select a category from the dropdown.
3. Enter a message in the Message Body.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance shows an error message indicating that the attachment type is not allowed.

test_cases.test_case: Send a secure message with maximum subject length
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Enter a subject with the maximum allowed length.
2. Select a category from the dropdown.
3. Enter a message in the Message Body.
test_cases.expected_result: Message sent successfully. Ticket ID is displayed.

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback successfully
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Select a reason for the call from the dropdown.
2. Select a preferred date that is at least the next business day.
4. Verify the Phone Number is pre-filled and editable.
test_cases.expected_result: Callback request submitted. An email confirmation is sent.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to request a callback with an invalid phone number format
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Select a reason for the call from the dropdown.
2. Select a preferred date that is at least the next business day.
4. Enter an invalid phone number format.
test_cases.expected_result: Inline guidance shows an error message indicating that the phone number format is invalid.

test_cases.test_case: Request a callback for the earliest possible date
preconditions: User is on the Support Center page
steps: 1. Select a reason for the call from the dropdown.
2. Select today's date if it is a business day or the next business day if today is not.
test_cases.expected_result: Callback request submitted. An email confirmation is sent.
